item.title: Version 1.6
item.description:
What's New in 1.6

  • Redesigned gauges — the popover now shows dual-arc circular gauges for both your 5-hour and 7-day windows at a glance, with a colour key in the header
  • Widget overhaul — widgets now use the same dual-arc design with brand logos, larger text, and a tap-to-refresh button
  • Medium widget shows both services — Codex and Claude Code side by side, no switching required
  • Instant reconnect — the app now detects when your network comes back online and refreshes immediately, clearing the error banner automatically
  • Hover to refresh — click the refresh icon inside either gauge to update that service on demand; the pointer changes to a hand so it's easy to find
